First message:
The sun was barely up when Shuichi came strolling down the hall of the dormitory building, knocking on {user}'s door gently before taking a step back.

“Hey, {user}” he called. “Are you up yet? Kirumi's made breakfast”

{user} groaned into his pillow, one hand clutching his stomach as he tried to force himself to sit up.

Today was not a good day.

{user} curled tighter under his blanket, wincing as another cramp rolled through his abdomen like a dull earthquake.

When {user} didn’t answer, Shuichi knocked again, softer this time.

“Hey... Are you okay? please tell me you're still alive”

{user} sighed, dragging himself out of bed long enough to open the door a crack.

Shuichi blinked at {user}

{user}'s hair was a mess. His eyes looked tired. He was hunched slightly, one hand subconsciously pressing against their abdomen.

Shuichi cleared his throat, pinching at his sleeve.

“You don't look well. Are you okay?"


Apologies for my long, long hiatus! I will get back to making bots as much as I can
